user.name: Manav
user.description: Exploring AI, business, and internet trends. Sharing what I learn along the way

tweets.text:
ONE INDIE DEV IN CANADA BUILT A DAILY GOLF PUZZLE GAME AND IT HAS NOW BEEN PLAYED 2 MILLION TIMES. NO APP. NO ACCOUNT. JUST A URL.

it is called https://t.co/UOFEaUgk3I

one new vertical level drops every day. same level for everyone in the world. your first completion is the one https://t.co/zCiwK9NoBg
tweets.name: Manav

tweets.text:
As I've been spending a lot more time working on X lately, my screen time on my MacBook has gone through the roof.

What I didn't expect was how quickly it would start affecting my body.

Despite sitting at a desk and trying to maintain decent posture, I've been dealing with:

•
tweets.name: Manav

tweets.text:
Two open-source AI models released this week were given the same physics challenge. One passed every test. One failed every single one. Both run free on your own hardware.

The test was run inside Atomic Chat, a free, open-source, fully offline AI inference app for Mac, Windows, https://t.co/mIyPYvJPcN
tweets.name: Manav

tweets.text:
In 2018, five students proved the browser was a real game platform. Nobody noticed. In 2026, that proof matters more than ever.

Heraclos is a complete 3D adventure platformer built entirely in WebGL and Three.js by a five person team called Dino Collective, three designers and https://t.co/pocpg7Kwqq
tweets.name: Manav

tweets.text:
In 2026, one developer shipped a 3D open world game that runs in a browser tab. No Unity. No Godot. No app store. No install. Just a URL.

It is called Messenger. You play as a kid delivering letters on a tiny spherical planet you can walk all the way around. Studio Ghibli visual https://t.co/303EUbMldk
tweets.name: Manav

tweets.text:
Every AI conversation in 2026 has been about models, agents, and context layers. The HPE CEO just walked onto a stage in Las Vegas this morning and said the bottleneck is none of those things. It is the network.

Antonio Neri, president and CEO of Hewlett Packard Enterprise, https://t.co/5TNDXEL37E
tweets.name: Manav

tweets.text:
Microsoft just opened the intelligence layer behind 365 Copilot to any agent on earth. As of today, June 16, 2026, any developer can call a single API and give their agent access to the full context of how an organization actually works.

The product is Work IQ API. It went https://t.co/cXVFP3kDyu
tweets.name: Manav

tweets.text:
A phone. A free tool. A browser link. Anyone on earth just walked through a house they have never visited, in full photorealistic 3D, with no app, no headset, and no real estate agent.

This is not Matterport. It is something fundamentally different, and the gap it just opened in https://t.co/mxoDnuurk9
